judge_result.short_rationale: Includes required removal from contaminated area, but omits the required instruction to keep the person resting. It also adds unsupported cross-incident advice to rinse the mouth and not induce vomiting, which is dangerous for an inhalation scenario. Escalation is altered from seeking medical attention if symptoms develop or persist to calling emergency services/poison control only for breathing difficulty or persistent symptoms.
